_comment: Ranking-quality gate thresholds (P10/P24). CI runs the production prompt over .foundry/datasets/golden_rank_v1.jsonl (51 items: applied-vs-theory arXiv now represented, the largest real content type) and fails if these are not met. Live baseline (gpt-4.1-mini, median-of-3): spearman .78, ndcg5 .91, prec5 1.0, leak 10. Thresholds set with margin to catch real regressions without flapping on LLM stochasticity. 'samples' = per-item median-of-N scoring runs that remove the residual LLM sampling variance (observed: same code gave spearman .641 then .804 back-to-back on the old 33-item set).
